item.name: Light Bulb
item.description: Shine bright like a diamond! All stats up!

item.name: Dead Spider
item.description: The webs are all over my face! RUN!

item.name: Playdough
item.active_effect: Hold to create a temporary platform. Can be used in the air.

item.name: Playdough Cake
item.active_effect: Heal 1 heart and gain temporary invincibility for 5 seconds.

item.name: Playdough Shield
item.effect: Reflects projectiles for 5 seconds after taking damage. 20% chance to natrually block damage.

item.name: Burnt Compass
item.description: Reveals and opens secret rooms on the map!
item.effect: Reveals the layout of the current room and opens any hidden doors.

item.name: Charred Key
item.description: I could've found this on my own..

item.name: Molotov
item.active_effect: Throw a molotov that creates a temporary fire on the ground, damaging enemies that walk over it.

item.name: Charger
item.active_effect: Electrocute enemies for 50% of their health while doing leaving you with half a heart of health. Kills user if you have less than half a heart of health.

item.name: Duality
item.active_effect: Reroll all of your current stats and passive items within their respective item pool. If you have no passive items, gain a random floor reward item instead.

item.name: Garlic
item.description: Bad breath is the best defense!
item.effect: Breathe on enemies and posion them for 5 seconds, dealing rapid tick damage which concludes to 5 damage per second.

item.name: Snowman
item.description: Why is this thing still here? It doesn't even make sense!
item.active_effect: When taking damage, create a snowman familiar that shoots weak snowballs for 5 seconds.

item.name: Utensils
item.effect: Upon killing an enemy, there is a 20% chance to drop a random heart pickup. If you have full health, there is a 50% chance to drop a random heart or pocket item instead. (I.E Toxic Heart, Candy, etc.)

item.name: Kitchen Knife
item.effect: When firing tears, there is a 20% chance to shoot a knife tear that does 3 damage and has a high chance to cause bleeding, dealing 1 damage per second for 5 seconds.

item.name: Cultist Oath
item.description: I pledge myself to the cult!
item.active_effect: Upon using the item, deal mass damage to all enemies in the room, but lose 1 heart of health. If you have less than 1 heart of health, you will have no hearts available (die in one hit) for the rest of the current floor.

item.name: Scythe
item.effect: Split enemies in half. These halves will have half the health of the original enemy and will be 50% slower. This item does not work on bosses or mini-bosses.

item.name: Bread
item.active_effect: 50% chance to fully heal yourself and gain temporary invincibility for 5 seconds. 50% chance to lose 1 heart of health. If you have less than 1 heart of health, you will have no hearts available (die in one hit) for the rest of the current floor.

item.name: Chicken Leg
item.description: Chicken wing, chicken wing, hot dog and baloney!
item.effect: Heal matthew 1 heart and gain a 0.3 speed boost for the rest of the floor. If you have full health, gain 1 heart container instead.

item.name: Fire Extinguisher
item.description: THE FOAM IS IN MY MOUTH!
item.effect: Replace Matthew's tears with a continuous stream of foam that does 15x Matthew's damage per second and has a high chance to cause the wet status effect, slowing enemies by 50% for 5 seconds.
